subject: Create 5 sci-fi design preview pages for comparison
description: Create a single Astro preview page that renders all 5 sci-fi design options (A: Neon Cyberpunk, B: Space Command, C: Holographic Prism, D: Digital Matrix, E: Quantum Flux) as separate full-width sections. Each section should show: a mini hero, 3 sample product cards, a sample brand grid, and a header snippet — all styled in that specific theme. The page should clearly label each option. This is for visual comparison only — not part of the final site.
